plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-304 RP09.P04.M03.S06-RP09.P04.M05.S05 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-304 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP09.P04.M03 primary UI tail (review-required state, interactions, permission badge, audit hint display, error message copy, responsive layouts, keyboard/focus behavior, visual density check, synthetic fixture binding, build smoke, Hermes UI evidence, Claude UI leak prompt, closeout handoff), the full M04 secondary workflow UI cycle (20 rows), and the M05 permission/audit binding head (5 rows) across three sections over 40 planned rows with a pack-local row-extras constant, Hermes evidence (H09), Claude review packet (C09), and CP00-305 handoff, without opening UI runtime, state writes, object storage, command runtime execution, Hermes runtime receipts, Citation Ledger, or Loop behavior.

parsed_review.summary:
CP00-304 is a clean descriptor-only closeout pack (RP09 "CRM And Business Development", phase RP09.P04, units RP09.P04.M03.S06 -> RP09.P04.M05.S05, risk class B, 40 units) at status "implemented_pending_review" with production_ready:false. The pack does NOT overclaim: production_ready is correctly false and no enterprise-trust claim is asserted from local validation. Verification performed via read-only tools (Read/Grep/Glob) only.

Internal consistency confirmed end-to-end: the live closeout-pack-plan.json CP00-304 included_units (lines 410-831) exactly match the 40-unit baseline and the registry requirements. Deliverable distribution reconciles across plan, registry (CRM_CORE_CP304_REQUIREMENTS), and prompt: claude_review 4, ui 16, security_audit 4, implementation 10, fixture 2, test 2, hermes_evidence 2 = 40. Micro-phase row counts M03=15, M04=20, M05=5. Unit-ID continuity is intact (CP303 ended at RP09.P04.M03.S05 "Denied state"; CP304 M03 begins at S06 "Review-required state") and the handoff target (RP09.P04.M05.S06, CP00-305) matches the binding's next_subphase.

Contract<->code consistency is enforced by scripts/validate-rp09-crm-core-contract.mjs via assert.deepEqual against contracts/crm-core-contract.json (current_pack, ui_workflow_slice_descriptor, cp304_requirements, cp304_no_write_attestation, historical_pack_bindings.at(-1)==="CP00-304"); Object.freeze immutability is applied throughout registry.js/service.js/validators.js. index.js re-exports all CP304 public symbols via `export *`.

No-write / no-real-data boundaries are intact: implementation_summary and freezeCp304Result assert descriptor_only/synthetic_only/no_real_data_loading=true, writes_product_state=false, real_client_data_loaded=false, executes_ui_runtime=false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, with 8 no-leak guards. Authority boundary preserved: claude_is_final_approval=false (service.js + contract line 8771 + attestation promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false + manifest claude_is_final_approver=false), human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false. Hermes patterns (createCrmCoreCp304HermesEvidencePacket) are deterministic descriptor/receipt builders only, not product runtime execution.

Review-hardening (CP178+) evidence is sound: readiness auth_preflight passed (exit_code 0, stdout_bytes 1455, well-formed JSON result {"ok":true}); no 0-byte stdout, malformed JSON, fenced-JSON-with-prose, or tool-call-shaped output; validation-report confirms forbidden_tools_present=false and tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob. command-evidence.json shows all local gates passing (node --check/--test, rp05-rp09 + closeout-pack-plan/weighted/spec/rp00/goal/fullplan validates, npm test, npm run validate, npm run build, git diff --check all exit_code 0), hermes gate H09 passed.

The three downstream pack artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are not yet present; this is the expected pre-review lifecycle state (pack_level_claude_review.status=pending, valid_review_receipts=[]) and is not a defect. Unrelated dirty files (the v2.0 .docx, c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json, new-session-handoff.md) are correctly flagged as preserved and out of pack scope. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. This PASS is a read-only reviewer recommendation only; it does not constitute final approval, which remains a human gate.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-304 crm core ui workflow slice descriptor pack
